subcommands.name: tailwindcss.sortClasses
subcommands.description: Sorts Tailwind utility classes in the selected class attribute following the recommended Headwind/Prettier-plugin-tailwindcss order.

subcommands.name: tailwindcss.showGeneratedCSS
subcommands.description: Displays the compiled CSS output for the Tailwind utility classes under the cursor or in the selection.

subcommands.name: tailwindcss.openConfig
subcommands.description: Opens the tailwind.config.js configuration file for the current workspace.

subcommands.name: tailwindcss.extractApply
subcommands.description: Extracts selected utility classes into a new CSS component using @apply directive.

subcommands.name: tailwindcss.showColorPalette
subcommands.description: Displays the full Tailwind color palette with hex values from the theme configuration.

subcommands.name: tailwindcss.convertToArbitrary
subcommands.description: Converts a standard utility value to arbitrary bracket notation, e.g. p-4 to p-[1rem].

subcommands.name: tailwindcss.removeDuplicates
subcommands.description: Removes duplicate utility classes from the selected class attribute.

subcommands.name: tailwindcss.wrapResponsive
subcommands.description: Wraps selected utility classes with a chosen responsive breakpoint prefix (sm:, md:, lg:, xl:, 2xl:).
